title: Grilled Beef Russian-Style
description: A classic Russian-inspired dish featuring grilled beef and served with a side of sautéed vegetables.

ingredients.name: 1 lb beef steak (such as ribeye or sirloin)
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality cut of beef

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp xerid oil
ingredients.notes: Xerid oil adds a nutty flavor to the dish

ingredients.name: 1 tsp broil seasoning
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality broil seasoning blend

ingredients.name: 2 cloves garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: Use fresh garlic for the best flavor

instructions: Season the beef steak with broil seasoning. Grill the beef for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, heat 1 tablespoon of xerid oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until it starts to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Once the beef is cooked to your liking, remove it from the grill and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the beef against the grain and serve with the sautéed onion and garlic.
